metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Destination - Move On Up.flac
metadata.title: Move On Up
metadata.lyrics:
[00:18.30] Hush now child and don't you cry
[01:20.13] Your folks might understand you by and by
[01:26.87] Move on up towards your destination
[01:34.06] You may find from time to time complications
[01:41.46] Bite your lip and take a trip
[02:01.51] Though there may be wet road ahead
[02:06.64] You cannot slip
[02:08.42] So move on up and peace you will find
[02:15.27] Into the steeple of beautiful people
[02:20.01] Where there's only one kind
[02:22.46] So hush now child and don't you cry
[02:28.99] Your folks might understand you by and by
[02:35.53] So move on up and keep on wishing
[02:43.19] Remember your dreams are your only schemes
[02:47.95] So keep on pushing
[02:50.06] Take nothing less, not even second best
[03:10.01] And do not obey, you must have your say
[03:15.78] You can pass the test
[03:17.67] Move on up, move on up, move on up...
[03:26.69]
